dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Anne. The village is falling apart. People are saying there might still be a way to fix this.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Word travels through here faster than anywhere else. So yes — I've heard the same.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Then tell me what you know.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Sarah's holed up in the laboratory. She was close to something before the lab went dark. Last I heard, she'd taken ill herself.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Infected?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: That's the word. The lab's locked tight. Key was lost out near the graveyard — long story. And there's no power running to the place. George at the powerstation can sort that, if you bring him a fuse.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Where do I get a fuse?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Inside the lab. Convenient, isn't it. Find the key first. Then talk to George.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah. Stay with me. I'm going to help you.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: You shouldn't be in here. I'm... already past the early symptoms. Analytically speaking, I'd give myself another day before cognition degrades.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Anne said you were close to a cure.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: I was. The synthesis machine here can produce an antidote — but it needs power, and a viable sample. There should be a cure sample at the hospital. Marcus moved it there before everything collapsed.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Power first. I have the fuse. George can install it.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Good. Logical sequence. Power, sample, synthesis. Then come back for me.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: George. I need power routed to the laboratory.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Lab's been dark for weeks. Blown fuse on the main line.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I have one.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Then install it here at the station. Breaker'll do the rest. Why the lab?

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah's alive. She thinks she can synthesize a cure.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Hm. Worth the amperage, then. Go ahead.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Marcus. There's a cure sample here. I need it.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Top shelf. Cold storage. I've been watching it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah's infected. She can still make the antidote if I move fast.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Then move. I'll hold this position. Don't waste the sample.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Understood.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Power's on. I have the sample.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: The lights — yes. The synthesis unit is humming again. Load the sample into the centrifuge intake. The machine handles the rest.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Walk me through it.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Don't need to. It's a one-button system once primed. I designed it that way... in case I couldn't be the one to use it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Hold on, Sarah. This is almost done.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: It's... working. The fever's dropping already. Remarkable.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: The village is still dying, Sarah. One vial isn't enough.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: No. But the process works. That's the breakthrough. Now we can scale it — if we can get more samples, and if we can keep this place running.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Then that's the next step.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Yes. But not tonight. Tonight, we have proof. That's more than we had this morning.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah, something's not adding up. The outbreak, the patrols, the lockdowns — it feels coordinated.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Because it is. I've been comparing infection patterns. The spread isn't random — it's directional. Someone is steering it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Steering it how?

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Releases. Controlled ones. And the strain itself — it's been engineered. I'd stake my career on it, if there were still careers to be had.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Who has that kind of capability on this island?

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: One person. The Doctor — at the Outpost. Viktor's man. If you want answers, you'll have to go through Viktor first. Talk to Anne at the store. She hears everything before anyone else does.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Anne. I need everything you've heard about Viktor and the Outpost.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Straight to it, then. Alright. Viktor's people come through here for trades. They never carry weapons made on this island — and they pay in pre-outbreak script. Someone's been funding him.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: The Doctor?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: The Doctor is the brain. Viktor is the fist. There's a key in the cave — the old outpost key. One of Viktor's men dropped it weeks ago and never came back to look. I'd take it, if I were you.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: What about the inner outposts?

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Outpost two and three are unguarded right now — most of his men are patrolling the roads. If you're going in, go quietly. And George at the powerstation knows more than he lets on. He used to wire the lights up there.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: George. The Outpost. What can you tell me?

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Wired the lower levels myself, years back. Three rooms. Two and three connect. The Doctor stays in three. Viktor in two.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Anything I should know before I go in?

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: There's a toolkit down there. Old one of mine. Take it if you find it — you'll need it for the boat.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Understood. Thank you, George.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Don't thank me. Just finish it.

dialogue_content.speaker: viktor
dialogue_content.line: You came alone. Either brave or stupid. I haven't decided which.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah says the outbreak was engineered. The Doctor's work. Your protection.

dialogue_content.speaker: viktor
dialogue_content.line: The Doctor serves a purpose. The outbreak gave this island a shape it never had before. Order. Me.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Order built on bodies isn't order. It's a graveyard with rules.

dialogue_content.speaker: viktor
dialogue_content.line: Then you misunderstand the world we're in. But I'll let you pass. Go talk to him. See for yourself what he's made. When you come back through this room, we'll settle accounts.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: We'll see who settles whose.

dialogue_content.speaker: the_doctor
dialogue_content.line: Ah. The variable I've been hearing about. Please — don't break anything. The equipment is irreplaceable.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: You released the strain. You started this.

dialogue_content.speaker: the_doctor
dialogue_content.line: I refined it. I observed it. The release was a controlled boundary condition. Whether the village survives or not is, in scientific terms, the experiment.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: And the people who died?

dialogue_content.speaker: the_doctor
dialogue_content.line: Data points. You may judge me — most do — but in fifty years, my notes will outlive your moral framework. Take the toolkit if you must. It's of no use to me.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I'm taking more than that.

dialogue_content.speaker: the_doctor
dialogue_content.line: Then take it and go. Viktor is waiting. I suspect that conversation will be less civil.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Marcus. The outbreak was engineered. Viktor's been backing the man who made it.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Figured as much. Patrols too disciplined to be improvised.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: We need a stronghold. Somewhere people can fall back to when this breaks open. The hospital is the best position we've got.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Agreed. Bring wood. I'll cover the approaches.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: I have it. Hold this position.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: That's the job.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Mary. I've got the toolkit. And wood.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: About time. Hand 'em over and stand back — I'll have her seaworthy by sundown.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: We may need her sooner than that. Viktor knows I've been to the Outpost.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Then quit talking and let me work. Anyone wants off this rock, they know where to find me.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Understood.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Good. Let's get this boat back where she belongs.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: The boat's fixed. Are we ready to leave?

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Boat's ready. Question is whether you are. Anyone you mean to bring, now's the time.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: There are people in the village. Sarah at the lab. Marcus at the hospital. Others.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Then go round them up. I'll keep her tied off till sundown. After that, I'm gone — with or without you.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Understood. I'll bring them to you.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: One more thing. Stock the hold. Farm's got food, if Linda'll part with it. Hungry passengers make for a long crossing.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Linda. Mary's boat works. We're leaving the island.

dialogue_content.speaker: linda
dialogue_content.line: Figured someone would, eventually.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: We need the food. For the crossing. And for whoever's left when we land.

dialogue_content.speaker: linda
dialogue_content.line: Take it. I'm not going anywhere. This land's mine, dead or living walking it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: You're sure?

dialogue_content.speaker: linda
dialogue_content.line: Sure as I've been about anything. Go. Tide doesn't wait.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Sarah. Mary's boat is fixed. We have a way off the island.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Off the island. That's... a significant variable shift.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Bring what you can. Your notes, samples — anything that helps you continue the work somewhere safer.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: The research is portable. I can be ready in minutes. Where do I meet you?

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: The dock. Go straight there. Don't wait for me.

dialogue_content.speaker: sarah
dialogue_content.line: Understood. I'll see you on the water.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Anne. We're leaving. Mary's boat sails tonight.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: I wondered when you'd come through that door with that look on your face.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Come with us. There's nothing left to stock here.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: I'll come. I've kept an ear to the ground, you know. Viktor knows something's moving. Best be quick about it.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Get to the dock. I'll round up the others.

dialogue_content.speaker: anne
dialogue_content.line: Already locking up. Don't be late, hero.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: George. We have a boat. Tonight.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: Grid won't run itself.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: It won't matter if there's no one left to use it. Come with us.

dialogue_content.speaker: george
dialogue_content.line: ...Fair point. I'll kill the breakers and meet you at the dock.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Good man.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Marcus. We're evacuating. Mary's boat. The dock. Now.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Position's fortified. I was going to hold here.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Hold for what? Everyone's coming with me. The island's done.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: ...Acknowledged. I'll bring up the rear. You move first — I'll make sure nothing follows.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Don't be a hero. Be on the boat.

dialogue_content.speaker: marcus
dialogue_content.line: Copy that.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Everyone's on their way. I brought the food.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: About time. Hand it over, I'll stow it in the hold.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: How long until we cast off?

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Soon as the last of them are aboard. Tide's turning.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Barricade's up. Sarah's aboard. George too. Anne's settling in below.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Marcus?

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Just came over the rise. He's the last one. We're ready when you are.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Then cast off. Take us out.

dialogue_content.speaker: mary
dialogue_content.line: Aye. Hold tight — the island's behind us now.

dialogue_content.speaker: PLAYER
dialogue_content.line: Goodbye to it.
